title: Monolog di Kotak Baja
theme: Seorang profesional muda menemukan kedamaian aneh dan refleksi diri yang sinis saat terjebak dalam lift, meninjau kembali pilihan hidupnya dengan humor gelap.

cover.prompt: Interior view of a sleek, contemporary elevator cabin. The metallic walls reflect a soft, intermittent glow from a single overhead emergency light. The scene captures a moment of quiet suspension, with the elevator stationary. Focus on the interplay of light and polished surfaces, creating a sense of suspended time. The composition uses depth and perspective to highlight the enclosed space and the subtle illumination.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, gentle color grading

meta.plan_summary: A young professional, Dani, finds himself unexpectedly trapped in an elevator, forcing a cynical yet humorous self-reflection on his corporate life, priorities, and existence. Through an internal monologue, he confronts the absurdities of his routine, eventually finding a peculiar sense of calm and acceptance amidst the unexpected pause in his busy day.
meta.target_emotion: Reflective amusement, ironic contemplation, quiet introspection, thoughtful humor.
